name: googledrive_get_file
description: Get detailed metadata for a specific file in Google Drive. This includes file properties, permissions, and sharing information. Use this to understand file details before performing operations.

fileId.description: The ID of the file to retrieve

fields.default: id, name, mimeType, size, createdTime, modifiedTime, parents, webViewLink, permissions, owners, shared, trashed
fields.description: Fields to include in the response

supportsAllDrives.description: Whether the requesting application supports both My Drives and shared drives

includeItemsFromAllDrives.description: Whether both My Drive and shared drive items should be included in results

response_transformer.description: Transform Google Drive file API response to standardized format

parameters.fields: id, name, mimeType, size, webViewLink, permissions
